name: Mall Santa Needs Relief
description:
Your job is to handle and manage the top 'talent' of the mall's Christmas Village. The Santa is your responsibility. He gets too aroused with people grinding into his lap all day long. Part of your job is to get him back into a state where he can work.

Yeah this is a bit early for Christmas, just enjoy it. Let me know your thoughts.

NSFW, fat man, Santa Claus, possible non-con
creator: joeStoryteller
